namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator

    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<string> String => __String ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __String, __Create_String());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<string>? __String;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<string> __Create_String()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<string>
            {
                Provider = this,
            };
